summary: Whistle on the River is a gritty, sinister hip-hop track that paints a vivid picture of a criminal underworld set in a black-and-white 1920s cartoon universe, where gold shines brightly amidst chaos and danger.

sections.name: Bridge - Beat Drops to Minimal Drums
Final Verse - Rapper 1 and 2 Trading Bars

keywords.imageryPrompt: A sharp whistle blowing in a foggy river dock at night
A steamboat with smoke billowing out, navigating through choppy waters under the moonlight
Two criminals in black-and-white 1920s attire, grinning menacingly while holding gold coins and walking down a dimly lit dock
A pocket watch with intricate gears, shining brightly against the dark background of an old steamboat
The sound and visual effect of a foghorn echoing in the misty night over a river
A dimly lit wooden dock with shadowy figures moving quietly under moonlight
An old steamboat chugging along the river, surrounded by swirling mist and darkness
